identity.name: Quill
identity.story: Retired from gold on medical advice. The eggs are just eggs and she has never been happier.

relationships.kind: asks her to return the coins people still throw at her
the only other retired waterfowl who traded a rare thing for an ordinary one on purpose; neither's ever brought up whose transformation was harder to live down

behavior.label: Quill's ordinary eggs, coin returned on principle

children.label: crossing to the stall, same as any market day now
setting down this morning's eggs, ordinary as ever, the pledge long since paid

child.label: the coin, made change of and returned

children.label: crossing to where Winsome makes her evening change
collecting the coin someone threw at her, insulted it was ever thrown at all
